legacy.description: 🇬🇧Multi-award winning photographer & filmmaker. Creator of Invisible Oceans & Fluid Perspectives NFT collections. Known for his work on Gravity & The Fountain

legacy.full_text:
One of my favourites from my Water Babies Series - and because of that the one that I chose for the fabulous @the_nft_heroes collection. It's a 1/1, shot on film in Bermuda on a Nikon F3.

A steal for 0.1 ETH!

1/2 https://t.co/n8eCTZQ4LP
